scripts.build: echo "Python service — no JS build step"
scripts.lint: bash scripts/with-venv.sh ruff check app/ || echo 'Skipping lint — run dev once to set up venv'
scripts.type-check: bash scripts/with-venv.sh mypy app/ || echo 'Skipping type-check — run dev once to set up venv'
scripts.test: bash scripts/with-venv.sh pytest || echo 'Skipping tests — run dev once to set up venv'
